# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: IAM Role for Lambda functions with broad access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch.

Parameters:
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: shared-lambda-execution-role
    Description: Name for the shared Lambda execution role.

Resources:
  SharedLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SharedLambdaAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Sid: S3All
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:*
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: DynamoDBAll
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:*
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: SQSAll
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:*
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: SNSAll
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:*
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: CloudWatchAll
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:*
                  - logs:*
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: XRayAll
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - xray:*
                Resource:
                  - "*"

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt SharedLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the shared Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref SharedLambdaExecutionRole
